goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'west' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 3'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'postcode'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'hotel' by '20:45'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the west and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should have a star of 3
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of college
Make sure you get phone number and postcode
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the hotel by 20:45
Make sure you get contact number and car type
